zh.title: 币安币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
当前币安币/美元整体呈现弱势震荡结构，价格运行在606附近，持续受制于20日均线611下方，短期多头动能不足，市场进入整理偏空阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD维持负值-2.74，空头动能仍占优势，均线系统中价格低于SMA20的611水平，反弹缺乏持续性，RSI缺失但整体偏弱。

支撑关注605及600整数关口，若跌破可能延伸下探；上方阻力位于611及615区间，突破前需放量确认，整体维持震荡格局运行。

操作建议以区间交易为主，未突破SMA20前偏空思路，反弹接近610-612可轻仓试空，跌破606关注止损保护，严格控制风险仓位管理。

en.title: Binance Coin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
BNB/USD is showing a short-term bearish tilt as price continues to hover just under the 20-period simple moving average at 611.13 while trading around 606.33. This positioning suggests sellers are still slightly in control after repeated failures to reclaim the 610–612 zone. The market structure reflects lower momentum, with price compressing near the session low, indicating hesitation but no clear bullish reversal signal yet.

From an indicator standpoint, the MACD reading at -2.74 reinforces weakening momentum and sustained downside pressure. Although a signal line is not provided, the negative histogram implication points to bearish continuation unless a convergence develops. The absence of RSI data limits overbought/oversold confirmation, but price action alone suggests BNB remains closer to a distribution phase than accumulation in the very short term.

Support is currently forming around the 606.00 level, which has already been tested as the session low. A breakdown below this area could open room toward the 600 psychological level, followed by a deeper support band near 592–595. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 611–613 (SMA20 zone), with stronger rejection expected near 620 if momentum returns.

Trading-wise, short-term strategies favor caution until a decisive reclaim of 611 occurs with volume confirmation. Scalpers may look for quick rebounds off 606 support, but continuation trades should wait for a breakout above the moving average.  remains range-bound for now, and positioning is best aligned with breakout confirmation rather than early anticipation of trend reversal.
